ham: Hello Alex, this is HR from XYZ Ltd. We would like to schedule your interview for the Data Analyst role. Please confirm if you are available on 20th September between 10:00 and 12:00 hrs. Reply 'YES' to confirm or 'NO' to reschedule.
spam: URGENT: YOUR ELECTRICITY CONNECTION WILL BE DISCONNECTED TONIGHT! Your bill of Rs. 12,400 is overdue. Pay now to avoid blackouts. Please make the payment immediately. <URL>
